changes.before: Once or twice her head turned a fraction, not toward any sound, but toward the pressure under the ground and in the air.
changes.after: Once or twice her head turned a fraction toward the pressure under the ground and in the air.

changes.before: He was dead. Sylvanas knew it before the priest beside him did. The corpse hung too slack.
changes.after: He was dead. The corpse hung too slack.

changes.before: The closer they came to the southern field tents, the cleaner the motion became.
changes.after: Closer to the southern field tents, people stopped jostling and cut straight from task to task.

changes.before: Jaina dipped her head. "We need the prince."
"It is the truth you have time for."
changes.after: "It means the routes are already live."

changes.before: One officer swore under his breath. Falric went still.
changes.after: One officer swore under his breath.

changes.before: "Then the larger war can wait its turn," he said. "This city won't."
changes.after: "Then the larger war can wait its turn," he said. "Stratholme is next."

changes.before: "There may still be a narrow answer," she said.
changes.after: "There may still be one shot at the grain," she said.

changes.before: "Granaries if any stock is intact. Bakehouses. Warehouse lanes where flour is stacked before it moves. The shell is strongest there. If I can break enough of it before it disappears into bodies, I might blunt the next turn."
changes.after: "Granaries if any stock is intact. Bakehouses. Warehouse lanes where flour is stacked before it moves. The shell is strongest there. If I can break enough of it before it disappears into bodies, I might keep the next wave from starting."

changes.before: He was already measuring distance, horseflesh, road width, which officers could move without sleep, how many bodies could disappear into a city that size before anyone understood the count.
changes.after: He tracked the roads, the quarter marks, the relay strips, one finger shifting from district to district.

changes.before: "Hours matter. Not days. The city may already be too far in. I don't know until I see the stock."
changes.after: "Hours matter. The city may already be too far in. I don't know until I see the stock."

changes.before: "Then you lose nothing you were not already willing to spend," Uther said. "If it succeeds, you arrive at a city with one door still open."
changes.after: "Then you lose nothing you were not already willing to spend," Uther said. "If it succeeds, you arrive before the grain reaches every quarter."

changes.before: "Ranger-General, your speed is useful in either column. Ride with me and clear the road ahead of the main body. Ride with her and buy the attempt everything it can be bought. I do not care which, so long as neither lane slows for want of discipline."
changes.after: "Ranger-General, your speed is useful in either column. Ride with me and clear the road ahead of the main body. Ride with her and buy the attempt every minute you can. I do not care which, so long as neither lane slows for want of discipline."
